name: Seq2048 + torch.compile + mid LR (1xA100 Draft)
blurb: Non-record 1xA100 draft submission. Best current run uses seq_len=2048, torch.compile, and moderately reduced learning rates on the 9x512 KV4 SP1024 baseline, improving single-A100 post-quant val_bpb from 1.4386 to 1.3556 while staying under the 16MB artifact cap.
